name: Freshsales
description: Freshsales CRM integration for managing contacts, accounts, deals, tasks, appointments, and notes

api_key.label: API Key
api_key.help_text: Your Freshsales API key. Find it in Personal Settings > API Settings.

bundle_alias.label: Bundle Alias
bundle_alias.help_text: Your Freshworks bundle alias — the 'yourcompany' in yourcompany.myfreshworks.com

list_views.description: List the available list views (filters) for contacts, accounts, or deals. Freshsales lists records through views; pass a view id from here to list_contacts/list_accounts/list_deals to use a specific view.

entity.description: Which resource to fetch views for

views.description: Available views, each with id and name
